questions.question: Describe the general form of a C++ program, including the main function and the use of #include directives.
questions.hint: Explain the purpose of each section

questions.question: What is the purpose of the #include directive in a C++ program?
questions.hint: Good answer should include file extension

questions.question: A C++ program typically begins with a main function. What is the purpose of this function?
questions.hint: Describe what the program does when main is called
